channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: An explosion of AI deepfakes is redefining American elections
item.description: AI-generated campaign ads, once a novelty, are now widespread, featuring attack ads that place candidates in fabricated scenarios.

item.title: Fox enters new era with Roku deal
item.description: Data: Nielsen; Chart: Axios Visuals Fox's $22 billion deal to buy Roku marks a turning point in the streaming wars and a new era for the Murdoch media...

item.title: How the Anthropic saga could threaten American AI dominance
item.description: The Trump administration says it wants American AI to dominate the world. But its decision to force Anthropic to abruptly cut off access to one of its...

item.title: Vance gives Catholic converts a bigger stage
item.description: Vice President JD Vance's memoir about his conversion to Catholicism, out Tuesday , puts a high-profile face on a small but distinctive slice of the U...
